targets.invoke: Use $mbti-typing to run a rigorous multi-round MBTI typing interview.
targets.contract: Codex skill plus repository AGENTS.md contract.

targets.invoke: Ask the agent to follow AGENTS.md and use the MBTI Typing Skill.
targets.install: Copy AGENTS.md and CONVENTIONS.md into the target repository root.

targets.invoke: Create a GPT or Project with gpts/mbti-typing-gpt-instructions.md as instructions and upload the canonical skill references as knowledge.
targets.install: Copy gpts/mbti-typing-gpt-instructions.md into the GPT Instructions field or ChatGPT Project instructions, then attach the listed knowledge files.
targets.contract: Custom GPT and Project instructions preserve the same candidate-set, runner-up, evidence-ledger, falsifier, and safety-boundary protocol.

targets.invoke: Ask Zed Agent Panel to use the MBTI Typing Skill rule, or @-mention the saved rule when available.
targets.install: Copy .rules and AGENTS.md into the target repository root, or save the same content as a Zed default rule/skill.
targets.contract: Zed project rule routes back to the canonical skill and shared safety boundary.

targets.invoke: Ask Devin to follow AGENTS.md and use the MBTI Typing Skill for the current type-me, duel, audit, or report-review task.
targets.install: Keep AGENTS.md at the project root; Devin and Devin CLI can load AGENTS.md project rules automatically.
targets.contract: AGENTS.md provides the portable Devin contract without creating a Devin-only protocol fork.
Project skill and slash-command fallback for Claude Code.

targets.invoke: Ask Cursor to use the MBTI Typing Skill rule, or mention @mbti-typing.
targets.install: Keep .cursor/rules/mbti-typing.mdc committed in the project root.
targets.contract: Project rule in MDC format plus AGENTS.md fallback.

targets.invoke: opencode run "Use the MBTI Typing Skill to distinguish ENTJ vs INTJ"
targets.install: Keep AGENTS.md and opencode.json committed in the project root.
targets.contract: AGENTS.md project rules with opencode.json instructions aggregation.

targets.invoke: gemini "Use the MBTI Typing Skill to run an ENTJ vs INTJ investigation"
targets.install: Copy GEMINI.md, AGENTS.md, and .gemini/settings.json into the target repository root.
targets.contract: Gemini context file imports the shared contract and canonical skill.

targets.invoke: Ask Copilot to use the MBTI Typing Skill for the current type-me, duel, audit, or report-review task.
targets.install: Copy .github/copilot-instructions.md, .github/instructions/mbti-typing.instructions.md, and .github/skills/mbti-typing/SKILL.md into the target repository.
targets.contract: Repository custom instructions plus project skill entrypoint.

targets.invoke: Ask Windsurf to apply the MBTI Typing Skill rule to a type-me, duel, transcript audit, or adapter task.
targets.install: Copy .windsurf/rules/mbti-typing.md and AGENTS.md into the target repository.
targets.contract: Workspace rule points back to the canonical skill and shared contract.

targets.invoke: Ask Cline to use the MBTI Typing Skill for the current typing task.
targets.install: Copy .cline/skills/mbti-typing/SKILL.md, .clinerules/mbti-typing.md, and AGENTS.md into the target repository.
targets.contract: Project skill and rule both preserve the canonical typing protocol.

targets.invoke: Ask Continue to apply the MBTI Typing Skill rule before answering type-me or report-review prompts.
targets.install: Copy .continue/rules/mbti-typing.md and AGENTS.md into the target repository.
targets.contract: Continue local rule points back to the canonical skill and shared safety boundary.

targets.install: Copy CONVENTIONS.md, AGENTS.md, and .aider.conf.yml into the target repository.
targets.contract: Conventions file keeps the same protocol visible to aider sessions.

targets.invoke: Ask Junie to use .junie/AGENTS.md, or run the project /mbti-type command with the case material as input.
targets.install: Copy .junie/AGENTS.md and .junie/commands/mbti-type.md into the target repository, or point Junie Guidelines path at AGENTS.md.
targets.contract: Junie guidelines and slash command preserve the canonical typing protocol.

targets.install: Copy .amazonq/cli-agents/mbti-typing.json into the target repository and run q chat --agent mbti-typing from that workspace.
targets.contract: Amazon Q custom agent loads the canonical skill and read-only reference resources.

targets.invoke: Switch to the MBTI Typing custom mode, then ask Roo to run a type-me, duel, transcript audit, or report review.
targets.install: Copy .roomodes and .roo/rules-mbti-typing/mbti-typing.md into the target repository.
targets.contract: Roo custom mode and mode-specific rules preserve the canonical protocol.

targets.invoke: Ask Kilo Code to apply the MBTI Typing Skill rule before answering type-me or report-review prompts.
targets.install: Copy kilo.jsonc and .kilo/rules/mbti-typing.md into the target repository.
targets.contract: Kilo project rules point back to the canonical skill and shared safety boundary.
